Experience the unbeatable deliciousness of Arnott’s Scotch Finger biscuits, a sweet biscuit preferred for its melt-in-the-mouth crumbliness and heavenly buttery taste. Snap, dunk and enjoy!

There's nothing more iconically Aussie than the snapping of a Scotch Finger biscuit. The buttery taste of these sweet biscuits is unmatched and an Aussie favourite for a reason. Whether you're looking for a tea time treat or a sweet biscuit for after dinner, look no further than an original Scotch Finger. Inject a bit of fun into your morning with an Arnott’s Scotch Finger biscuit, made to snap and dunk in your favourite cuppa. It’s the perfect and most delicious choice for an indulgent me-time treat.

Iconic shortbread fingers

Snap and share

No artificial colours or flavours

Aussie made, Aussie loved

There is no substitute

Try oven-baked Ritz Crackers Original, the ideal crowd pleaser for any occasion. Everyone Loves a Ritz Fix.

If you're looking for the perfect snack to eat on it's own, top your Charcuterie board or pair with your favourite cheese, dip, or entertaining with family & friends, and want a platter that will steal the show, Ritz is your perfect accompaniment. AdditionalAttributes.description:
Mini in Size, Mighty in Snackability
Parkers Baked Pretzel Minis Multipack of 8 Salted 200g may be bite-sized snacks, but they are hardly mini when it comes to snack satisfaction. Each pack of baked pretzels offers a delightful exploration of the senses. Coated lightly with salt, biting into this baked snack brings a satisfying crunch to your day. When you need a mini salty snack to tide you over, reach for one of these mighty multipacks.

Ready to Go When You Are
If it's a convenient snack for on the go you're looking for, then these salty pretzels are your answer. With 8 portions in this multipack, everyone can enjoy a taste of what Parkers pretzels have to offer. No matter if you're looking to embark on an all-day outdoor activity, or need a new addition to your workbreak lunchbox, these mini pretzels are always ready.

Wholesome Fun For All
When it comes to wholesome snacks, Parkers pretzels are a permissible treat all can enjoy when snack time comes around. Each mini pretzel is low in saturated fat and contains no added MSG, making them an easy choice to add to your family's pantry. With 8 portions to spread out in the multipack, everyone can get their hands on this baked snack. However, they better move quickly before the pack is gone!

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!

Arnott’s Jatz Original crackers are a legendary crowd pleaser that everyone knows and loves. With a tasty base and great crunch, they're perfect for topping, a dip or just by themselves. Jatz crackers have been oven baked the famous Arnott’s way for over 70 years. Made from 100% Australian-sourced wheat, Jatz are crafted for their versatility. Satisfy your cravings with Arnott's Salada Original Crispbread. These oven-baked savoury biscuits are perfect for levelling up your snack time or creating the ultimate lunch. Snap into Arnott's Salada Original biscuits and enjoy a timeless classic.

Discover the original, the icon, the classic Arnott's Salada Original cracker.  TThis Australian made crispbread is made with real sourdough starter and without any artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives. Arnott's Salada Original biscuits deliver an authentic taste experience. Top them with fresh avocado, tomato, cucumber, hummus, or cheddar cheese for a stunning snack or light lunch. For a sweet treat, try mixing them with butter, brown sugar, and chocolate to create Christmas Crack—perfect for festive occasions! Arnott's Salada is the perfect companion for any occasion. With 2 stay-fresh packs, these crispbreads are ideal for snacking at home, in the office, or on-the-go. Whether you're pairing them with fresh veggies, spreads, or creating a sweet holiday treat, Salada Wholemeal is as versatile as it is delicious. With 2 stay-fresh packs, these crispbreads are ideal for snacking at home, in the office, or on-the-go.

• Oven-baked crispbreads for a satisfying crunch

• Low in saturated fat for a healthier choice

• Perfect for snacking or light lunches

• No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives

• Foil packed for freshness

AdditionalAttributes.description:
The ultimate chocolate bar experience for you and your mates! This chocolate bar features a delicate, crispy wafer wrapped in smooth milk chocolate and hazelnut cream. Each chocolate bar is carefully finished with a fine dark chocolate drizzle, making it the perfect treat for any snacking moment.

Get ready to treat your tastebuds with Kinder Bueno, the chocolate bar that brings together indulgent flavour sensations with a light finish. Each chocolate bar promises a melt-in-your-mouth crispy wafer, wrapped in creamy milk chocolate, bursting with a smooth hazelnut cream, and meticulously finished with a fine dark chocolate drizzle. It's a genuine showstopper for any snacking moment!


Every Kinder Bueno chocolate bar is individually wrapped to guarantee tip-top quality, so you know you're always getting the good stuff. Whether you're flat out on the go, needing a quick choc break, hitting the road for a trip, kicking back watching the footy, glued to a movie, or even celebrating special moments like Valentine's Day – Kinder Bueno chocolate bar is the perfect treat for every occasion. This isn't just a chocolate, it's an experience!


Treat yourself to a Bueno, you deserve it!

DOUBLE DELIGHT CHOCOLATE BAR: Each pack comes with two individually wrapped chocolate bars, perfect for sharing with a mate or saving one for later

ULTIMATE CHOCOLATE SNACK: Whether you're smashing out assignments at uni or just chilling with your group of friends, Kinder Bueno Chocolate Bar is the ultimate snack to keep everyone happy.

A TASTE SENSATION: Experience the perfect blend of creamy milk chocolate, rich hazelnut cream, and a satisfyingly crispy wafer – a delightful texture and flavour combo that'll keep you coming back for more.

LITE YET SATISFYING SNACKING: Kinder Bueno chocolate bar offers a truly indulgent yet surprisingly light snacking experience, making it perfect anytime.

An Australian-made Fan Favourite
Smith’s Crinkle Cut Chicken Potato Chips were introduced as Australia’s first flavoured chips in 1961 and continue to satisfy Aussie families with the same passion and dedication to taste. 
Our Crinkle Cut Chicken Chips are made from no artificial flavours or colours and they’re even gluten free, making them perfect tabletop snacks at your party. 

Ideal as Lunch Snacks for All Ages
They’re not just for occasions though, the 170g share pack is the perfect size to divide up into snack-sized portions to fill up the lunchboxes and work lunch bags. Their delectable, finger-licking seasoning makes them an ideal snack to munch on to relieve your midday cravings. 

Potato Snacks Fit For Any Occasion
Smith’s Chicken Chips are the perfect lunch snacks to pack for outdoor activities like watching the kids play sport or enjoying a picnic in nature. So grab a bag of Smith’s Chips today for a delicious savoury snack to be enjoyed at any occasion.

You know you love ‘em.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Arnott's Monte Carlo cream-filled biscuits are the most iconic cream biscuit for a reason. With two coconut and honey biscuits filled with smooth vanilla cream wrapped in a chewy jam, it doesn't get much better than this.

Arnott’s Monte Carlo cream is the perfect morning treat to share with a pot of tea as you catch up with friends – or for when you’re feeling peckish. Named after the glamourous seaside city, the flavour of a Monte Carlo cream-filled biscuit will transport you to deliciousness. This Aussie favourite cream biscuit is made for those me-time moments when all you need to do is relax and unwind. With a simple twist and split, flavours of sweet coconut, honey, vanilla and jam await. Treat yourself to a spot by the Mediterranean with a Monte Carlo.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Cobs Popcorn Sea Salt Gluten Free. A wholesome product, it's gluten-free and made with Australian corn, ideal for a satisfying snack. Shop now!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Naturally Delicious

Made with only three simple, quality ingredients, Cobs Sea Salt Popcorn contains no artificial flavours, colours, or preservatives. It's gluten-free, nut-free, vegetarian, vegan and contains wholegrain. Next time you need a light, crunchy, and naturally flavourful snack, reach for the popcorn that Aussies love.


Australian-Made

Our Sea Salt is made right here in Australia using quality, locally sourced corn kernels. Popped to perfection in high oleic sunflower or canola oil, we create fluffy and crunchy popcorn, to which we sprinkle the perfect amount of sea salt.


The Perfect Snack for Every Occasion

Whether you're enjoying a backyard barbecue, packing school lunches, or settling in for a cozy movie night, Cobs Sea Salt Popcorn is the go-to snack. Its satisfying crunch and classic salty flavour make it the perfect companion for road trips, picnics, and afternoon pick me-ups.
